summary: Tested all Iteration 3 frontend changes: ED page badge/H1/anchors, Productos page anchors, /nosotros route removal, navbar Equipo, quiz, homepage ED tab Ver más links.

ui_bugs.issue: /nosotros route shows blank page instead of 404 or redirect. App.js removed the route but React Router renders empty content instead of redirecting. Footer still has 'Nosotros' link pointing to /nosotros.

action_items: Add a catch-all route or redirect for /nosotros → / or 404 page, since deleting the route leaves blank page
critical_code_review_comments: Navbar still shows '¿Qué producto necesito?' link - if this is a quiz anchor link (href='/#quiz') that's fine, but if it was supposed to be removed along with the route, verify intent.
tests_passed: Quiz on homepage (id='quiz') visible with 3 questions, buttons work ✅
Homepage ED tab 'Ver más' links point to correct anchors (#ed-master, #ed-teach, #ed-math) ✅
tests_failed: /nosotros shows blank page instead of 404/redirect (LOW priority)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 3 changes all verified. ED page badge='NUESTRAS ED TECH', H1='Estudiantes Digitales', anchors ed-master/ed-teach/ed-math working, productos anchors botbee/cert/blog working, quiz works, ED tab Ver más links correct. Only issue: /nosotros route renders blank page (route removed from App.js but no redirect added).
